---
name: Standards Compliance Request
about: Request support for a new standard, profile, or norm
title: ''
labels: standards
assignees: ''
---

**Standard**
Full name and identifier (e.g., "ETSI EN 319 142-1 PAdES Baseline Profile B-LTA")

**Link to specification**
URL or DOI for the relevant specification.

**Current status in SimpleSign**
What works today, and what doesn't.

**Required changes**
- [ ] New OID constants
- [ ] New CMS attributes
- [ ] New validation checks
- [ ] New interop tests
- [ ] Documentation updates

**Priority**
- [ ] Required for production (blocking)
- [ ] Important for compliance
- [ ] Nice to have
